verdict_reasoning: DPEP1 is a kidney membrane enzyme and member of the M19 metallopeptidase family. It is a single-pass transmembrane protein with an extracellular catalytic domain. Its documented function — processing extracellular substrates including leukotrienes (LTD4 to LTE4) and glutathione — requires access from the outer face of the plasma membrane. The protein reaches the surface via its own TM anchor.
